section.small: estimation from 2.72mb of code in 1309 edited files across 345 commits

section.div: LearnTrace is a personal learning history tracker that helps students and self-learners log courses, skills, and achievements in a chronological timeline. It visualizes learning patterns, supports reflection, and makes resume building and domain discovery easier through structured analytics.
It help research people do quick analysis of research paper and get quick insights

LeetCode Pattern 500 offers 500 solutions for LeetCode problems in Python and Java, 17 notes on essential concepts related to data structures and algorithms, and 130 patterns for solving LeetCode problems.
